---
title: "Modelling Exercise 3"
subtitle: "Spot the errors in this model"
---

## Spot the errors

You asked an LLM to model and transform a certain dataset into Linked Data for LINCS, but without giving the LLM the appropriate skills files that tell it which graph patterns LINCS uses.

The LLM returned this knowledge graph. How many errors can you see?

::: {.callout-important}
## NOTE
**This graph intentionally contains errors. DO NOT use it as reference!**
:::

### Quiz

List all the errors you find here: [https://app.sli.do/event/hJfrRAUyKwLfvD2VMPzyUc/live/polls](https://app.sli.do/event/hJfrRAUyKwLfvD2VMPzyUc/live/polls)

(feel free to respond multiple times if you find more)
